name: Waikiki Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 13 1/2 ounces pineapple chunks in light syrup, chopped very fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix meat, crumbs, onion, egg, salt, ginger, and milk.
2. Shape the mixture into balls using rounded tablespoonfuls.
3. Melt shortening in a large skillet; brown and cook the meatballs. Remove the meatballs and keep them warm.
4. Pour off the fat from the skillet.
5. Mix cornstarch and sugar. Stir in reserved pineapple juice or syrup, vinegar, and soy sauce until smooth.
6. Pour into the skillet and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
7. Add meatballs, pineapple pieces, and green pepper. Heat thoroughly.
